title: Tab management: list, switch, detach handling
description: Verify tab listing, switching, and debugger detach handling through encrypted channel

steps.action: Establish encrypted session, then daemon calls listTabs()
steps.expected: Returns array of { id, title, url } for open Chrome tabs, all through encrypted channel

steps.action: Daemon calls switchTab(tabId) for a specific tab
steps.expected: Extension attaches chrome.debugger to that tab, returns success. Yellow infobar appears.

steps.action: Daemon sends CDP command to the attached tab
steps.expected: CDP command executes on the correct tab, result returned (encrypted)

steps.action: User opens DevTools on the debugged tab (simulating detach)
steps.expected: chrome.debugger.onDetach fires, extension sends encrypted notification to daemon with reason

steps.action: Daemon sends CDP command after detach
steps.expected: Error returned: debugger not attached to any tab
